12. ! [X0] : (can_do_jump_shots(X0) | ~professional_basketball_player(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]

20. ~can_do_jump_shots(X0) | leaps_straight_into_air(X0) [cnf transformation 13]

22. ~activates_leg_muscles(yuri) [cnf transformation 5]
23. leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) | professional_basketball_player(yuri) [cnf transformation 15]
25. 1 <=> professional_basketball_player(yuri) [avatar definition]
27. professional_basketball_player(yuri) <- (1) [avatar component clause 25]
29. 2 <=> leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) [avatar definition]
30. ~leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 29]
31. leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) <- (2) [avatar component clause 29]

37. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 35,22]
38. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 37]
39. can_do_jump_shots(yuri) <- (1) [resolution 27,19]
40. leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) <- (1) [resolution 39,20]
41. $false <- (1, ~2) [forward subsumption resolution 40,30]
42. ~1 | 2 [avatar contradiction clause 41]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 32]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 38]
s3. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 42]

s5. # [rat s1,s2,s4]
